KaTeXGPT - AI to Word Equation Converter. (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude & More)
Converts equations into Word-compatible format with a single click. Perfect for students and researchers!

ChatGPT & DeepSeek Equations to Word Equation Converter

Easily convert mathematical equations from ChatGPT and DeepSeek to Microsoft Word with just one click!

🔥 KEY FEATURES:
• Convert equations with a single click
• Microsoft Word compatible format (MathML)
• Visual feedback for each copy
• No configuration required
• Completely free!

• Students working on their thesis or notes
• Researchers writing academic papers

1. Open ChatGPT or DeepSeek

Keeper Wallet is your entry point to the Waves blockchain and Waves-powered web services

🔷 Store your account keys securely
Seed phrases and private keys are encrypted and stored within the extension and cannot be accessed by the dApps and services on the web, giving you peace of mind that your funds are always safe from hackers and malicious sites.

🔷 Manage your assets
– Check full asset info and balance, add assets to favourites and filter them by name or ID
– Transfer assets and NFTs quickly and intuitively: hover over the three dots next to the asset or NFT and choose the transfer arrow option.
– Exchange assets instantly directly in Keeper. Click the “Swap” button, select the pair of assets and specify the amount.

🔷 Sign transactions
Third-party applications are required to request your signature for each transaction. Before signing, you can review the transaction details, then confirm or reject it. Complete transactions with just one click, no need to enter any sensitive information.

🔷 Switch between wallets
You can create or import multiple Waves wallets and switch between them easily.

🔷 Backup your accounts
Export your accounts to the encrypted Keystore file and store it in a safe place. Use it to restore access to your accounts or import them into Keeper on a new device. To create the backup, go to settings and select “Export accounts”.

🔷 View transaction history
Keeper displays up to 100 most recent transactions for each account. You can apply a range of filtering options, including transactions with incoming or outgoing transfers, transaction ID, asset ID or name, and wallet address.

Whether you’re endlessly scrolling through Instagram Reels, clicking through games, or filling out lengthy forms, this free auto clicker extension handles the tedious work so you can focus on what matters.

Works Everywhere - No Download Required

Select some text and it will be instantly copied to the clipboard! Paste it with one click!

🟢Select any text in a web page and it will be automatically copied to the clipboard (hold Ctrl to bypass, ⌘ on Mac). 

🟢You can also quickly paste the copied text by clicking on the mouse wheel, or by double clicking the left mouse button while keeping the Ctrl key pressed (⌘ on Mac).

🟢If you keep the Shift key ⬆ pressed while pasting, the field into which you are pasting will be emptied of all already existing text before pasting.

🟢Bypass the auto copy functionality in input fields (needs to be activated in the options page)

🟢Automatically add text before or after the copied text (needs to be activated in the options page)

🟢Automatically add the webpage URL to the copied text (needs to be activated in the options page)

✂-------------------------

🚨IMPORTANT🚨: please reload Chrome after installing the extension, in order to activate it.

- Click on the extension button to turn the extension on/off.
- Right click on the button to open the options page or the user guide.

🔎NOTE: 
- The extension does not work on the New Tab page (the page that opens when you click on the + sign in Chrome). This is standard behaviour for all extensions.
- The extension does not work on pages whose URL starts with the word "chrome", for example chrome://extensions/ or chrome://settings/.
Experience the future of crypto with QSafe — post-quantum signatures, multi-chain support, and full self-custody in one wallet.

QSafe: Quantum-Secure Crypto Wallet

The world’s safest multichain wallet. Powered by Quranium.

Quranium is the world’s first multi-chain wallet built for the quantum age; a secure Chrome extension powered by native Quranium chain integration and fortified with Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC).

Built for the Quantum Age

In a world where quantum computing threatens traditional encryption, Quranium leads the way with the strongest cryptographic defenses available:

SLH-DSA (SPHINCS+): A NIST-approved, hash-based digital signature algorithm, offering protection against both classical and quantum attacks.
ML-KEM: A lattice-based key encapsulation mechanism used for encrypting and exchanging keys securely.
PK Modules (Probabilistic Key Modules): Adds entropy and randomness to private key protection, making extraction exponentially harder—even by quantum adversaries.

Seamless Multichain Experience

Manage your digital assets across multiple blockchains in one secure interface:

Native Quranium Chain: Fast, secure, and quantum-safe by design.
Bitcoin (BTC): Secure storage and transaction support, with future quantum-safe capabilities planned.
Ethereum (ETH) & EVM Chains: Full support for ETH, BSC (More chains coming in future like Polygon, Avalanche, and more) plus DApp access and ERC-20 management.

Key Features

Quantum-Safe Security: Protect your assets with advanced PQC standards.
Multichain Asset Management: Unified interface for Quranium, Bitcoin, Ethereum, and EVM chains.
Native Quranium Integration: Tap into the Quranium chain’s full capabilities directly from your wallet.
User-Friendly Interface: Designed for everyone, whether crypto-curious or experienced.
Non-Custodial: You control your keys. Always.
Advanced Key Protection: Enhanced private key security with PK Modules.
Seamless DApp Connectivity: Easily connect to your favorite Web3 apps.
Transaction Monitoring & Address Book: Keep track and transact faster.
Secure Seed Phrase Backup: Standard 12/24-word recovery phrase stored safely on your device.
Ongoing Updates: Regular feature improvements and new chain integrations.

Why QSafe?

Quantum-Ready, Today: Don’t wait for the threat—protect your assets now.
Built with Purpose: Explore the power of the Quranium chain.
No More Juggling Wallets: Manage everything in one place.
Your Keys. Your Crypto. 100% non-custodial.
Peace of Mind: Know you’re secured with future-proof cryptography.

Get Started Now

Download the QSafe Chrome extension and take control of your quantum-secure future.

Please note: QSafe is currently in Beta. While we take every measure to ensure security and performance, please use at your own risk.

Constructs debate cites from html tags or page info and copies to clipboard.

Cite Creator is a cross-browser extension that creates cites for use primarily in US high school or college competitive debate. It's designed to work well with the Verbatim template (https://paperlessdebate.com). Includes keyboard shortcuts for quickly modifying/copying the cite.
A TON Wallet in your Browser

OpenMask is an extension for accessing TON enabled decentralized applications, or "dApps" in your browser! MetaMask analog for The Open Network.

The extension injects the ton web3 API into every website's javascript context, so that dApps can read from the blockchain.

OpenMask also lets the user create and manage their own identities (via private keys, local client wallet), so when a dApp wants to perform a transaction and write to the blockchain, the user gets a secure interface to review the transaction, before approving or rejecting it.

The application support network features: Jettons, NFT, TON DNS, TON WWW, TON Proxy, TON Sites and more!

The wallet support biometric authentication via Touch Id for Mac, Yubikey or mobile phones. 

Because it adds functionality to the normal browser context, OpenMask requires the permission to read and write to any webpage. You can always "view the source" of OpenMask the way you do any Chrome extension, or view the source code on Github:
https://github.com/OpenProduct/openmask-extension

A self-custodial wallet in your browser. Send, receive, create value with ease. | Learn more at https://crossmark.io

Crossmark is a browser-first, self-custodial wallet built for interacting with the XRP Ledger. https://www.crossmark.io

Security. 
Crossmark is a noncustodial wallet that uses industry standard practices to encrypt users private keys. Our key management system has been audited by some of the largest auditing firms and experts in the industry. The encrypted private keys never leave your device, giving you full control of your wallets and digital assets.

Functionality. 
Crossmark enables users to easily engage with all XRPL ecosystem dApps. Designed with future functions on the XRPL in mind, Crossmark integrates with all custom XRPL networks for ease of development and testing.

Customizability. 
Crossmarks’ opt-in features allow users to curate their own experience on the platform. Email notifications, NFT cards, etc.

Adaptability.
Crossmark supports different XRPL custom networks

An Integration of Sniply into your favourite Browser.

Sniply lets you embed your own call-to-actions onto every piece of content. Embed custom messages into articles from CNN, TechCrunch, Mashable, BBC, anywhere. Sniply allows you to drive conversion through content marketing on every piece of content.


OVERVIEW

Sniply will automatically detect anytime you type or paste a link, and then ask if you want to embed a message into that page. You can type in a custom message and the link will automatically be converted into a Sniply link that contains the page with your message embedded.


TOP FEATURES
* Add a CTA on any page you decide to snip!

* Save links to clipboard, to be snipped later through our dashboard.

* Your Sniply dashboard will show how many clicks you’re getting on your links, as well as the level of engagement with your embedded content.

* Use Sniply for capturing leads, promoting blog posts, selling products, getting email sign ups, driving traffic, and anything that requires exposure.

* Sniply is great for bloggers, marketers, entrepreneurs, non-profits, event organizers, and anyone wishing to drive call-to-actions.


SAMPLE USE CASES

* Entrepreneur sharing a Forbes article with news of his startup embedded into the page

* Writer sharing a BBC article with an Amazon link to her book embedded into the page

* Event Organizer sharing a Mashable article with a registration link embedded into the page

 Try it yourself at https://app.snip.ly


Much love,
Sniply Team


Email: team@snip.ly

Twitter: @sniply
Facebook: fb.com/sniplyapp

Manage Everscale wallets and access dApps directly from your browser

FOR USERS
EVER Wallet is a Google Chrome extension that lets you manage your seed phrases, private and public keys, and wallets in a secure fashion without leaving your favorite browser.
Import existing keys or create new ones; choose popular wallet contracts to use; manage permissions you provide to dApps (DEXes, bridges, multisig wallets, etc.); protect your data with encrypted local key storage.
EVER Wallet extension is a fully remastered version of the famous desktop Crystal Wallet created by the Broxus team. Enjoy a new convenient interface with the same speed and security!

FOR DAPPS
EVER Wallet injects the RPC API object into every website’s DOM context so that the distributed applications can read from the blockchain and interact with smart contracts. Be it a decentralized exchange, browser game, cross-chain bridge, or multi-signature wallet, EVER Wallet will serve you as a lightweight, configurable, and reliable Everscale client.

PRIVACY AND PERMISSIONS
The extension does not and will not collect any data from you, so we will be grateful if you provide us your feedback in the Chrome store, on our Github page, Telegram chat, or send us an e-mail. See the “Useful links” section below.
However, it will require your permission to read and write to any webpage, as it enhances the functionality of the normal browser context. You can always view the source code of Crystal Wallet on Github.

USEFUL LINKS
Website: https://everwallet.net
Extension source code: https://github.com/broxus/ever-wallet-browser-extension
Everscale site: https://everscale.network
Support chat in Telegram: https://t.me/broxus_chat

One-click to bypass webpage copy restrictions, Smart copy of website tab. with auto-copy of selected text and super copy features.

Introduction

SmartCopy is a powerful Chrome extension designed to enhance your browsing experience. It can help you crack the webpage prohibition of copying, prohibiting right-clicking, prohibiting selection, prohibiting pasting with one click, intelligently copying the website tab title and URL, and providing automatic copying of selected text and super copy functions. In addition, it also includes a complete clipboard history system, allowing you to view and reuse previously copied content at any time.

1. Main functions

1.1 Tab Copy

Copy current tab: copy the currently browsed tab information with one click
Copy all tabs: Copy all tab information of the current window at once
Multiple Format Support: Supports multiple copy formats, including:
  - Title - URL
  - Title only
  - URL only
  - Markdown format
  - HTML link
  - [Title] URL
  - CSV format
  - JSON format
  - HTML Table

1.2 Automatic copy function

- Automatically copy selected text: Once enabled, just select the text on the web page to automatically copy it to the clipboard
- Minimum character limit: You can set the minimum number of characters for automatic copying to avoid accidental copying
- Copy format selection: support copying in plain text or Markdown format to meet the needs of different scenarios

1.3 Clipboard History

- History management: save all the content you copied so that you can view and reuse it at any time
- One-click repeat copy: click on the item in the history to copy it again
- Clear history: Clear all history records with one click

1.4 Super Copy Function

Super Copy can automatically break the restrictions of copying, right-clicking, selecting, pasting, etc. on web pages, allowing you to freely copy content on most restricted pages.

1.4.1 Switches and default behavior

- Global default off: After the extension is installed, the super copy function is turned off by default.
- One-click switch: You can turn on/off this function at any time by clicking the "Enable super copy function" switch.

1.4.2 Floating button control

- Floating button display control: Users can customize whether to display the floating button of the super copy on the page in the advanced settings
- Hidden by default: The floating button is set to not be displayed by default to avoid interfering with normal browsing
- Global effect: This setting is effective for all websites. Once set, it will be applied globally
- Drag to adjust: When the floating button is displayed, you can drag the button to adjust its position

1.4.3 Memory Mechanism

- Global Memory: After switching the super copy switch, the extension will automatically remember your global settings and will remain effective after refreshing the page or restarting the browser.
- Site Personalization: Supports turning on or off super copy for specific websites, which takes priority over global settings.

1.4.4 Usage scenarios

- Support copying high-quality files such as Baidu Library
- Support copying various social networking sites
- Support copying various technology websites
- Support copying high-quality content from We-media websites such as WeChat public accounts
- Supports copying various literature, novel sites, Sina Reading, NetEase Reading, etc.

1.5 Shortcut Key Support

- Alt+1: Copy the current tab
- Alt+2: Copy all tabs
- Alt+3: Toggle automatic copy function
- Alt+4: Open clipboard history

1.6 Multi-language support

- Automatic language detection: automatically switch the interface language according to the browser language
- Multi-language interface: supports simplified Chinese, traditional Chinese and English interface
- Manual switch: You can manually select your preferred interface language in the settings
- Full internationalization: all interface elements, prompts and notifications support multi-language display

2. Basic Usage

2.1 Copy Tab

1. Click the extension icon to open the pop-up window
2. Select your preferred format in the "Default copy format" drop-down menu
3. Click the "Copy Current Tab" or "Copy All Tabs" button
4. The content will be automatically copied to the clipboard and a success notification will be displayed

2.2 Using the automatic copy function

1. In the extension pop-up window, toggle the "Automatically copy selected text" switch
2. Select your preferred copy format:
    - Plain text: Copies the original text content without retaining formatting
    - Markdown: Convert the selected content to Markdown format, retaining basic formatting and links
3. When you select text on a web page, the text is automatically copied to the clipboard in the selected format
4. A notification will appear to confirm that the text has been copied

2.2.1 Enhanced automatic copy function of selected text

2.2.1.1 Function Introduction

SmartCopy now provides an enhanced automatic copy function for selected text, allowing you to copy content more intelligently and flexibly when browsing the web:

- Multiple format support: You can choose to copy content in plain text or Markdown format
- Intelligent format retention: In Markdown mode, the basic format of the original text will be retained as much as possible

2.2.1.2 Usage

1. Enable the function: Enable "Automatically copy selected text" in the extension pop-up window
2. Select the format: In Advanced Settings - Automatic Copy Settings - Select Text Copy Format - Select "Plain Text" or "Markdown" in the drop-down menu
3. Copy content: Select any text on the web page and the system will automatically copy it to the clipboard in the selected format
4. View the results: Paste into any editor to view the copied content

2.2.1.3 Markdown Format Features

When Markdown format is selected, SmartCopy will:

- Preserve the basic structure and format of the web page
- Automatically convert HTML to Markdown format
- Automatically process common web page formats, such as titles, lists, quotes, code blocks, links, images, unordered lists, ordered lists, separators, tables, etc.

2.2.1.4 Applicable scenarios

- Content creation: retain formatting and links when collecting materials from web pages to improve work efficiency
- Information organization: Organize web page content into Markdown notes to keep the structure clear
- Document writing: quickly extract content from web pages into Markdown documents to reduce formatting work

2.3 View Clipboard History

1. Click the "Clipboard History" button in the extension popup
2. On the History page, you can:
    - View all copied content
    - Click the Copy button below the item to copy the content again
    - Click the Delete button to remove a single item
    - Click the "Clear History" button to delete all history records

2.4 Using Super Copy

1. Click the "Super Copy" button in the extension popup
2. Use the switch button to enable or disable Super Copy.
3. If you want to display a floating button, you can turn on the "Display floating button on the page" option in "Super Copy Settings".
4. If you need to set it up separately for a specific website, just switch the Super Copy under that website.
5. The settings will be automatically memorized without manual saving.

2.5 Using shortcut keys

- Alt+1: Copy the current tab (using default format)
- Alt+2: Copy all tabs (using default format)
- Alt+3: Enable/disable automatic copy function
- Alt+4: Open the clipboard history page

2.6 Advanced Settings

Click the "Advanced settings" link at the bottom of the extension popup to access more settings options:

- Minimum number of characters: Set the minimum number of characters for the automatic copy function
- History limit: Set the maximum number of clipboard history records to save
- Floating button display: Controls whether to display the super copy floating button on the page

3. Recent Updates

Updated May 2025

3.1 Add multi-language support

- Added three new interface languages: English, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese
- Support automatic detection of browser language and switching interface
- Support manual selection of preferred language in settings
- All interface elements, prompts and notifications support multi-language display

3.2 HTML to Markdown function optimization

- Enhance the stability and compatibility of HTML to Markdown
- Improved handling of complex HTML structures
- Fixed the issue that HTML to Markdown conversion failed on some websites
- Optimize the quality of Markdown format output

3.3 Copy prompt optimization

- Improved the display logic of successful copy notification
- Fixed the issue where variables in the prompt message were not replaced correctly when "Copy all tabs" was selected
- Optimize the internationalization of notification messages

3.4 Enhanced super copy function

- Improved Super Copy compatibility on more restricted sites
- Optimize the dragging experience of the super copy floating button
- Improved memory of site specific settings

3.5 Floating button display control function

- Added floating button display switch: Added "Super Copy Settings" section in Advanced Settings, where users can customize whether to display the floating button
- Default hidden design: The floating button is set to be hidden by default to avoid interfering with the normal browsing experience
- Global validity mechanism: This setting is valid for all websites, and it is applied globally once it is set
- Multi-language support: fully supports simplified Chinese, traditional Chinese and English interface
- Real-time effect: setting changes take effect immediately, without restarting the extension or refreshing the page

4. FAQ

Q: Why is the text not copied automatically after I select it?

A: Please confirm the following points:

- Auto-copy is enabled (check the switch status in the extension popup)
- The selected text exceeds the minimum character limit (the default is 5 characters)
- You are not selecting text in an editable area (such as an input box)

Q: How to switch to copying in Markdown format?

A: In the extension pop-up window, after enabling the "Automatically copy selected text" function, you can select "Markdown" format in the drop-down menu in Advanced Settings - Automatic Copy Settings - Selected Text Copy Format, and then the selected content will be automatically copied to the clipboard in Markdown format.

Q: What formats will be retained when copying Markdown format?

A: Markdown format copy will preserve the following formatting as much as possible:

- Basic structure of text (paragraphs, line breaks, separators)
- Links (converted to Markdown link format)
- Basic formats, such as titles, unordered lists, ordered lists, references, etc.
- Simple text styling (e.g. bold, italic)
- Code blocks (converted to Markdown code block format)
- Image (converted to Markdown image format)
- Table (converted to Markdown table format)

Q: Why doesn't the HTML to Markdown function work on some websites?

A: The HTML to Markdown function depends on the HTML structure of the webpage. In the latest version, we have greatly improved the compatibility, but you may still encounter problems on some special websites. If you find that the conversion effect is not ideal on a certain website, you can try the following methods:

1. Make sure you are using the latest version of the SmartCopy extension
2. Try to select a smaller range of text to copy
3. For complex web page structures, you may need to select and copy them in sections
4. If the problem persists, please report it to us through the feedback channel and we will continue to optimize this feature.

Q: How to completely clear the clipboard history?

A: On the Clipboard History page, click the "Clear History" button, then click "OK" in the confirmation dialog box. This will permanently delete all history.

Q: Will my history be synced to other devices?

A: No. Clipboard history is only saved on the current device and will not be synced to your other devices.

Q: How to control the display of the super copy floating button?

A: You can control the display of the floating button by following the steps below:

1. Click the extension icon to open the pop-up window
2. Click the "Advanced Settings" link at the bottom
3. In the "Super Copy Settings" section, find the "Show floating button on page" switch
4. After turning on this switch, all web pages will display the super copy floating button
5. After turning off this switch, the floating buttons of all web pages will be hidden
6. The settings will be automatically saved and take effect immediately

Note: The floating button is hidden by default to avoid interfering with your normal browsing experience.

5. Privacy Statement

SmartCopy respects your privacy:

- All data is stored only on your local device
- No data is sent to external servers
- No personal information or browsing history is collected
- Request only necessary permissions to achieve its functionality

6. Feedback and Support
